name: Branding Smite
casting_time: 1 bonus action, which you take immediately after hitting a target with a Melee weapon or an Unarmed Strike
description: The target takes an extra 2d6 Radiant damage from the attack. The target also sheds Dim Light in a 5-foot radius and can't benefit from the Invisible condition for the duration. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2.
